programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Across the country, deer season to many Americans is a rite of passage. For generations, Winchester has been the trusted ammunition choice for hunters…and it’s been a decade since the game-changing Deer Season XP whitetail line was introduced. In this episode, we’ll celebrate the many successes by Team Winchester hunters in the field during whitetail and mule deer firearm seasons across the United States. GUESTS: Melissa Bachman (Team Winchester) Mark Drury (Team Winchester) Nikki Boxler (Team Winchester) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester) Jason Gilbertson (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The mission of Shoot United is to be a content resource for millions of shooters and a place where people can learn, build confidence and find ways to participate. Through films, educational videos and articles, SU has impacted countless shooters all over the world. In this episode, join Shoot United Ambassadors as they inspire and educate through a series of instructional videos and stories in pistol, self-defense, trap and skeet and sporting clays. GUESTS: Thea Van Sync (Team Winchester) Callie Farill (Team Winchester) Becky Yackley (Team Winchester) Theo Ribbs (Team Winchester) Jessica Hook (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Illinois isn’t the first state you think about when it comes to waterfowl, but the Wentz Brothers have dialed in some honey holes over the years. On this episode, a slew of waterfowl experts put to the test some of the newest Winchester waterfowl ammunition during the great migration of the Mississippi Flyway in early December. We’ll also head north to the shores of Kodiak Island, Alaska with Chris and Casey Keefer as they push the limits of Winchester’s new Last Call Double Shot on fast-ripping sea ducks. GUESTS: Zach Wentz (Team Winchester) Nathan Robinson (Winchester Ammunition) Ryan Swaner (Winchester Repeating Arms) Chris Jennings (Ducks Unlimited) Mike Brasher (Ducks Unlimited) Scott Olmsted (American Hunter) Travis Hall (Field & Stream) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep108: North Pole

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: T-minus one day to the mission, and the All-Stars are feeling the pressure. With a warm-up course of fire under their belts, the team levels up to some serious firepower—thanks to the experts at Capitol Armory. Just when they think the day can’t get any more intense, Don sends them sky-high for a one-of-a-kind shooting challenge aboard the Capitol Armory chopper. Once back on solid ground, the All-Stars dive into critical training scenarios designed to make or break their mission success. With time ticking down and expectations mounting, the team must dig deep, trust their instincts, and come together like never before.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.
